authorization_boundary.classification_authority: Jarrad confirmed the app has never been used, contains no genuine learner activity and has no course content worth salvaging.
authorization_boundary.deletion_gate: Only after the real course passes acceptance and Jarrad separately authorizes the guarded production execution.

live_read_only_capture.credential_path: 1Password service-account read of the Browser V1 owner fixture, then owner-scoped read-only production queries
live_read_only_capture.protected_answer_field_note: answer_options.is_correct is not owner-readable. IDs and public fields matched live production while is_correct came from the rollback snapshot and must be rechecked by service role before execution.
live_read_only_capture.post_capture_migration_default_note: Post-capture migration fields are included in fixture fingerprints at their required defaults: thumbnail_path and content_import_id are null and assignment rubric is an empty array.

answer_options.current_read_surface: public.answer_options_public plus protected is_correct from rollback snapshot
